features.title: Release artifacts to project root
features.description: Move release.json and CHANGELOG.md out of .harness/ to the project root so they survive cleanup. Update all references in commands, agents, roles, patterns, and SKILL.md.
steps: Verify patterns.md references release.json and changelog.md at project root (not .harness/)
Verify releaser.md role references root-level release artifacts
Verify coordinator.md references root-level release artifacts
Verify SKILL.md references root-level release artifacts
Run grep -r '.harness/release.json' plugins/harness/ and confirm zero matches
Run grep -r '.harness/changelog.md' plugins/harness/ and confirm zero matches (case-insensitive)

features.title: /init pre-flight guard
features.description: Add re-init detection (warn if .harness/ exists with status active), read existing release.json from project root for version continuity, and verify git repo presence.
steps: Verify init.md contains a Pre-flight section
Verify pre-flight includes re-init detection checking .harness/ with status active
Verify pre-flight includes reading release.json from project root for version continuity
Verify pre-flight includes git repo presence check
Verify init.md includes the shared state validation block from F-007

features.title: /session post-flight release trigger + dependency resolution + handoff cleanup
features.description: After evaluation, check if all required features pass and auto-trigger the releaser. Before feature selection, resolve depends_on and skip blocked features. On successful completion, clean up stale handoff.md.
steps: Verify session.md contains a Post-flight section
Verify post-flight includes all-features-pass check and auto-release trigger
Verify session.md includes dependency resolution before feature selection
Verify session.md includes handoff.md cleanup on successful completion
Verify session.md includes the shared state validation block from F-007

features.title: /run timeout safety + release verification
features.description: Add context-window timeout handling and post-run verification that release.json exists when all features are complete.
steps: Verify run.md contains context-window timeout handling instructions
Verify run.md contains post-run release.json existence check when all features pass
Verify run.md includes the shared state validation block from F-007

features.title: /reset state preservation
features.description: Ensure .harness/ existence before handoff, never delete root-level release artifacts, update state.json to paused, verify handoff.md completeness.
steps: Verify reset.md ensures .harness/ existence before handoff
Verify reset.md explicitly preserves root-level release.json and CHANGELOG.md
Verify reset.md updates state.json status to paused
Verify reset.md includes handoff.md completeness verification
Verify reset.md includes the shared state validation block from F-007

features.title: /release validation guards
features.description: Refuse release when required features still fail. Detect double-release (same feature set). Verify clean git working tree.
steps: Verify release.md refuses release when any required feature has passes: false
Verify release.md detects double-release of same feature set
Verify release.md checks for clean git working tree
Verify release.md includes the shared state validation block from F-007

features.title: State validation in all commands
features.description: Add a shared pre-flight block to all 5 commands: verify .harness/ exists, validate state.json fields, validate features.json structure, validate config.json with defaults.
steps: Verify all 5 command files (init, session, run, reset, release) contain a shared pre-flight validation block
Verify pre-flight validates .harness/ directory existence
Verify pre-flight validates state.json required fields
Verify pre-flight validates features.json structure
Verify pre-flight validates config.json with defaults

features.title: Releaser manifest sync
features.description: Update agents/releaser.md to sync version into marketplace.json, plugin.json (harness), and .codex-plugin/plugin.json after release.
steps: Verify releaser.md contains manifest sync instructions
Verify manifest sync covers marketplace.json
Verify manifest sync covers plugin.json (harness)
Verify manifest sync covers .codex-plugin/plugin.json
Verify sync happens after release artifact generation

features.title: Harness SKILL.md workflow entry section
features.description: Add a Workflow Entry section to skills/harness/SKILL.md with state checks, domain skill routing, and integrity invariants (ownership rules for features.json, state.json, release.json).
steps: Verify SKILL.md contains a Workflow Entry section
Verify Workflow Entry includes state checks
Verify Workflow Entry includes domain skill routing
Verify Workflow Entry includes integrity invariants with ownership rules for features.json, state.json, and release.json

features.title: harness-sdlc activation check
features.description: Add an Activation Check section to skills/harness-sdlc/SKILL.md verifying domain_profile: software, tech stack detection, and test configuration reading.
steps: Verify harness-sdlc/SKILL.md contains an Activation Check section
Verify activation check verifies domain_profile is software
Verify activation check includes tech stack detection
Verify activation check includes test configuration reading

features.title: harness-ea activation check
features.description: Add an Activation Check section to skills/harness-ea/SKILL.md verifying domain_profile: architecture, architecture deliverables, framework detection, and repository structure.
steps: Verify harness-ea/SKILL.md contains an Activation Check section
Verify activation check verifies domain_profile is architecture
Verify activation check includes architecture deliverables check
Verify activation check includes framework detection
Verify activation check includes repository structure check
